title: Oru Yathramozhi
subTitle: A vengeful son's search for his estranged father leads to unexpected complications when he finds himself growing close to a government contractor.

title: Ponnum Poovum
subTitle: Dasan falls in love with Subhadra while providing her refuge after being deserted by her husband. Later, he discovers, her husband was looking for her after being released from jail.

title: Chiriyo Chiri
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of the funniest and most entertaining comedy scenes and videos from various famous Malayalam movies.

title: Kudamattam
subTitle: Appukuttan and Gauri meet during a village festival. After some constant fights, they fall in love but her brother, Shivan Kutty, has a different plan for her.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Malabaril Ninnoru Manimaaran
subTitle: Meenu, a young woman, is stuck between her divorced parents who want to marry her off to a man of their individual choice. However, her life takes a turn when Balan enters the scene.

title: Oliyambukal
subTitle: A man decides to avenge the death of his father. He makes up his mind to adopt all possible means to satiate his vengeance.

title: Kashmeeram
subTitle: A group of terrorists kills the Indian Home Secretary Rajan Varma's nephew. NSG Officer Shyam is appointed to protect Rajan's sister Usha and her daughter.

title: Bharathchandran I.P.S.
subTitle: Hyder Ali Hassan, a scheming politician, is in league with the underworld and runs a lot of illegal businesses. Balachandran, an IPS officer, is sent on a mission to capture him.

subTitle: Revathy, a woman with special needs, falls in love with her rapist. When she tells her brother Mukesh to get her married to him, he initially agrees but later learns the truth.

title: Thenkasipattanam
subTitle: A man, who harbours feelings for his childhood friend, hides the truth from his best friend. However, trouble arises when his best friend falls in love with her.

subTitle: Immanuel's life takes an odd turn when the publishing firm that he works for shuts down. He gets a job in an insurance company but faces severe hardships, which end up changing him as a person.

subTitle: When Jayanthi's husband, Ramesh, who is accused in a gold smuggling case, goes missing, she comes to Kochi to find him. In her quest to locate him, she comes across Raju, a taxi driver.

subTitle: Nandini is a bookworm who always wanted a writer for a husband. However, by binding her in marriage with a businessman, life teaches her that she may not always get what she wishes for.
